---
title: "About the Project"
format: html
---

## Project Overview

This project is a data-driven narrative focused on housing affordability and real estate opportunity.

It combines public housing data, rental data, and mortgage rate information to help explain:

- when buying may not be the best financial move
- why some housing markets are more favorable than others
- how location changes both affordability and investment potential

## Audience

The intended audience is the general public, especially people trying to understand the real tradeoffs between renting and buying.

## Project Goals

The goals of this project are to:

- tell a clear and engaging housing story
- use data responsibly and accessibly
- combine analysis with narrative design
- create both static and interactive visualizations
